brand.title: Ammar Ardak
brand.subtitle: From your deed to your home in minutes
wizard.sidebar.title: Your Home Questions
wizard.sidebar.subtitle: 6 short questions — 2 minutes
upload.title: Design your villa from your land deed
upload.subtitle: Upload the deed image and we'll read your land data automatically — no manual entry needed
upload.drop_label: Drag & drop your deed file here
upload.choose_file: Choose a file from your device
upload.hint: PDF or image — Real Estate Exchange document or traditional deed
upload.privacy: Your deed data is processed securely and never shared with third parties
upload.analyzing.title: Analyzing your deed
upload.analyzing.subtitle: Please wait a moment...
upload.file_error: Unsupported file type. Please upload a PDF, JPG, or PNG file.
upload.file_too_large: File size exceeds 20 MB. Please upload a smaller file.
landing.eyebrow: From empty land to a home that feels like you
landing.hero_title:
Design the start
of your Saudi home
landing.hero_desc: Upload your land deed, answer a few simple questions, and get a preliminary architectural vision that considers your family's needs and lifestyle.
landing.how_title:
Three steps separate your land
from your home's first vision
landing.how_desc: No architectural experience needed — we guide you clearly from the first detail to the first plan.
landing.step1_text: We read dimensions and boundaries automatically, and you can enter them manually anytime.
landing.step2_text: Short questions about family, majlis, services, and lifestyle.
landing.step3_text: A preliminary 2D plan and a 3D massing model ready for development.
landing.start_title:
Every beautiful home
begins with its land
landing.start_desc: Upload a clear photo or PDF of the deed. We'll analyze the land data and ask you to review it before moving to any step.
landing.start_bullet2: We never share your files with third parties
landing.start_bullet3: You can edit every detail manually
landing.upload_drop_selected: Drop file here or click to choose
landing.upload_drop_empty: Drop file here or click to choose
landing.upload_change: Click to choose a different file
landing.upload_formats: PDF, JPG, or PNG — up to 10 MB
landing.upload_action_choose: Choose a file from your device
landing.upload_privacy: Your file is deleted after processing
landing.features_title:
Architecture starts with people,
not with walls
landing.features_desc: We combine your land data with family needs to propose a logical space organization, respecting privacy, hospitality, and the nature of the Saudi home.
landing.feature1_text: We extract land area, boundaries, and frontages to start from accurate data.
landing.feature2_text: Every suggestion is shaped by your family size and daily needs.
landing.feature3_text: Solutions that respect privacy, majlis, hospitality, and the local climate.
landing.result_title:
A vision you understand
and build upon
landing.result_desc: See the space distribution and their relationships, then move to the 3D massing model. The result is not a construction plan, but a smart starting point for discussion with your architect.
landing.final_kicker: Your first step is easier than you imagine
landing.final_title:
Your land holds your home's story.
Let's start drawing it.
landing.footer_desc: A preliminary architectural vision to help you start your journey with confidence.
confirm.title: Review your land data
confirm.subtitle: This data is as stated in the deed — review and edit as needed before proceeding
confirm.coords_hint: We couldn't read coordinates from the QR code — choose your land's location on the map or enter coordinates manually.
confirm.coords_qr_hint: We read your land's coordinates from the QR code — you can adjust the location on the map if it isn't accurate.
confirm.coords_error: Please enter both latitude and longitude (numbers) before proceeding.
confirm.dims_hint: We couldn't always read dimensions from the deed — verify your land width and length before proceeding.
confirm.dims_error: Please enter land width and height (positive numbers) before proceeding.
confirm.btn: Data is correct — proceed to family questions
confirm.source: Source: Electronic deed No. {{num}} — Ministry of Justice
manual.title: Enter your land data manually
manual.subtitle: Fill in the basic information from your deed and land coordinates if possible.
manual.coords_hint: Land coordinates — enter if possible to show your land location on the map in the final result.
manual.coords_error: Please enter both latitude and longitude (numbers) before proceeding.
manual.retry: Try again with a clearer image
generating.title: Designing your plan now...
generating.hint: This usually takes less than a minute
generating.step1: We read your land data from the deed
generating.step4: Choosing the best and preparing the plan
q1.title: How many family members?
q1.subtitle: This helps us calculate the appropriate number of rooms
q2.title: Are there elderly or people with accessibility needs in your family?
q2.subtitle: We'll place a bedroom with an accessible bathroom in a convenient location
q3.title: How do you host your guests?
q3.subtitle: Your choice determines your home's privacy — the most important question
q3.desc1: Automatically includes: guest bathroom + nearby dining area
q3.desc2: Full separation for men's and women's hospitality with private entrances and independent facilities
q3.desc3: No separate majlis — hospitality in the living room
q4.title: How do you prefer your kitchen?
q4.subtitle: A closed kitchen with a prep kitchen is a popular choice in Saudi villas
q5.title: Do you need service rooms?
q5.subtitle: Select all that apply — driver and maid rooms have independent entrances
q6.title: We've prepared your home's room list
q6.subtitle: From your answers — adjust with the counters as you wish, then start designing
room_catalog.title: Your home spaces — filled from your answers, adjust as you wish
room_catalog.subtitle: Every change reflects instantly on size — we'll monitor the area against your land
room_catalog.banner: 231m² of 60% allowable build area — fits your land (2,892m²) comfortably ✓
result3d.title: Your plan is ready
result3d.subtitle: Based on your land and answers — we tried 18 arrangements and found the optimal one for you
result3d.banner: Excellent privacy — positive independent entrance and bedrooms away from guest area
result3d.footer: Preliminary model — design priorities after design
result3d.footer_note: Preliminary design – design priorities after design
extraction_failed.title: We couldn't read the deed data
extraction_failed.retry: Try again with a clearer image
extraction_failed.manual_subtitle: Fill in the basic information from your deed and land coordinates if possible.
